package repository

import "context"

// TenantsRepository is a draft repository boundary for tenants.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type TenantsRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query TenantsQuery) ([]Tenant, error)
}

type TenantsQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
